column2: Record: 7-9-0, Finished 4th in AFC East Division...W 41-29 at San Diego Chargers;  L 17-10 vs Seattle Seahawks;  L 23-13 at New England Patriots; W 27-24 vs Los Angeles Rams (OT); W 34-10 at Buffalo Bills; L 10-7 at Cleveland Browns;  L 32-14 vs Miami Dolphins; L 27-21 vs Atlanta Falcons; W 27-13 at San Francisco 49ers; L 17-14 vs Baltimore Colts; L 24-17 vs Buffalo Bills; W 31-28 at New Orleans Saints; W 26-3 vs New England Patriots; W 10-6 at Baltimore Colts; L 34-7 vs Pittsburgh Steelers; L 34-14 at Miami Dolphins.
